title: neea petenensis
intro: Neea petenensis, also known as the Mayan firecracker, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can be found in its leaves and stems. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Neea petenensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to utilize its medicinal benefits.
